title: sorghum distachyon
intro: Sorghum distachyon, also known as broom sorghum or wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the sorghum genus and is native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of sorghum distachyon include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and lower blood sugar levels. Sorghum distachyon can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or supplement, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a healthy lifestyle.
